text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The clean, modern geometry of the first room evokes a quiet, almost clinical atmosphere—a place where knowledge is protected and shared. The transition into the vibrant exhibit space dedicated to R+D intensifies my awareness of human inquiry and progress. I am reminded of the continuous interplay between creativity and intellect, and I am somewhat awed by how thoughtfully these environments have been crafted to stimulate reflection on innovation and our relationship with technology. There is a calm energy here, a laboratory of ideas, where I feel both humbled and inspired as an observer and a participant.
